query:
-- 1. 기존 테이블 백업
RENAME TABLE accounting_transactions TO accounting_transactions_old;

-- 2. 새로운 accounting_transactions 테이블 생성 (복식부기 원장)
CREATE TABLE accounting_transactions (
  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  transaction_date VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT '거래 일자 (YYYY-MM-DD)',
  account_code VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL COMMENT '계정 코드',
  account_name VARCHAR(100) NULL COMMENT '계정명 (스냅샷)',
  debit_amount DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0.00 COMMENT '차변 금액',
  credit_amount DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0.00 COMMENT '대변 금액',
  description TEXT NULL COMMENT '적요',
  source_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL COMMENT 'PURCHASE/SALE/MATERIAL_ISSUE/BATCH_COMPLETE/DISPOSAL',
  source_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT 'doc_id 또는 batch_id',
  source_line_id VARCHAR(64) NULL COMMENT '라인 id 또는 내부 생성키',
  action_type ENUM('POST', 'REVERSAL', 'RETURN') NOT NULL COMMENT '행동 타입',
  reversal_of_id BIGINT NULL COMMENT '원본 거래 ID (역거래인 경우)',
  posted_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  created_by BIGINT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY idempotency_key (source_type, source_id, source_line_id, action_type, account_code),
  INDEX idx_transaction_date (transaction_date),
  INDEX idx_account_code (account_code),
  INDEX idx_source (source_type, source_id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 45KYJfAwvASo98o.bfca2b77e1a0 --database ePrX25nq5sECZ3f72okXeB --execute -- 1. 기존 테이블 백업
RENAME TABLE accounting_transactions TO accounting_transactions_old;

-- 2. 새로운 accounting_transactions 테이블 생성 (복식부기 원장)
CREATE TABLE accounting_transactions (
  id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  transaction_date VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT '거래 일자 (YYYY-MM-DD)',
  account_code VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL COMMENT '계정 코드',
  account_name VARCHAR(100) NULL COMMENT '계정명 (스냅샷)',
  debit_amount DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0.00 COMMENT '차변 금액',
  credit_amount DECIMAL(15, 2) DEFAULT 0.00 COMMENT '대변 금액',
  description TEXT NULL COMMENT '적요',
  source_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL COMMENT 'PURCHASE/SALE/MATERIAL_ISSUE/BATCH_COMPLETE/DISPOSAL',
  source_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT 'doc_id 또는 batch_id',
  source_line_id VARCHAR(64) NULL COMMENT '라인 id 또는 내부 생성키',
  action_type ENUM('POST', 'REVERSAL', 'RETURN') NOT NULL COMMENT '행동 타입',
  reversal_of_id BIGINT NULL COMMENT '원본 거래 ID (역거래인 경우)',
  posted_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  created_by BIGINT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY idempotency_key (source_type, source_id, source_line_id, action_type, account_code),
  INDEX idx_transaction_date (transaction_date),
  INDEX idx_account_code (account_code),
  INDEX idx_source (source_type, source_id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
